* # How It Works
1
###
Funding Request
Submit "Funding Form" and discuss the relevant product to your business objectives
2
###
CIS & Term Sheet
Discuss key terms and present your company information
3
###
Onboarding / Intake
Complete onboarding process on our system and execute Engagement Letter to start our work on the selected product
4
###
Deliver
Work through the process of our delivery for the dedicated product of your choice till successful completion!
